title: Jack of all Mods
description: This modpack aims to spice up the vanilla experience of minecraft, offering multiple mods such as: technology, optimization and brand new adventures!
body:
This modpack aims to spice up the vanilla experience of minecraft, offering:
- Optimization Mods (such as Sodium, Indium and all that stuff)
- Eye candy (Fresh animations, Fresh moves and some other visual mods)
- New structures
- Technology! (ComputerCraft and Create (Both can be connected))
And a lot more!
